name: vetcare-system
description: Sistema de Gestión Clínica Veterinaria — monorepo de microservicios

scripts.install:auth: npm install --prefix services/user-management && npm install --prefix services/clinical-history && npm install --prefix services/tracking-reminders && npm install --prefix services/storage-service && npm install --prefix services/query-visualization && npm install --prefix services/notification-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm run install:auth && npm install --prefix services/clinical-history && npm install --prefix services/tracking-reminders && npm install --prefix services/storage-service && npm install --prefix services/query-visualization && npm install --prefix services/notification-service
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,pets,rem,storage,query,notif,web -c cyan,blue,yellow,gray,magenta,red,green "npm run dev:user-management" "npm run dev:clinical-history" "npm run dev:tracking-reminders" "npm run dev:storage-service" "npm run dev:query-visualization" "npm run dev:notification-service" "npm run dev:frontend"
